calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-15-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-15-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-18-11 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner Frank J. Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Maurice Moyal, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Sindyra Alvarado, who was placed under oath and examined.
Defendant Steve Ly was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, September 15, 2008.
Notice of Time and Placed of Trial was filed on July 14, 2008.

Parties reached a settlement which was read into the record by Mr. Moyal. In accordance with the terms of the agreement defendant Steve Ly shall pay plaintiff Sindyra Alvarado the sum of $10,000.00. This amount shall be paid through monthly installments of $300.00 per month, commencing on December 15, 2008, with each subsequent payment of $300.00 due on the fifteenth of each month thereafter.

Defendant Steve Ly shall be in default of this agreement is any of his monthly payments are late more than thirty days, whereupon the entire balance shall become due.

Matter is continued to October 18, 2011 @ 10:00 a.m. in Department 212 on the CRC 3.1385 Dismissal Calendar.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2008 Off Calendar

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
